name: cheer touch
description: Stay protected under the sun with our daily-use lotion. Perfect for the beach, sports, or backyard fun. Its fast-absorbing, lightweight formula provides high-performance defense without clogging your pores.

name: tropicana blush
description: Get a fresh, effortless pop of color with our creamy, buildable blush stick that melts seamlessly into the skin for a natural, dewy finish.

name: tropicana bronzer
description: Add a healthy splash of hydration and a natural wash of color to your skin with our multi-use Tinted Moisture Stick.

name: tropicana lip balm
description: Deeply hydrate and nourish your lips with this conditioning balm that locks in moisture for a soft, smooth finish.

name: tropicana sunscreen
description: Protect and nourish your skin daily with our high-performance SPF 50+ sunscreen that shields against intense UV rays without leaving a heavy or greasy residue. This fast-absorbing, invisible formula locks in moisture and provides advanced defense, making it your ultimate daily skin shield.
